description: Fix flaky patterns in hot-reload-dynamic.e2e.ts: missing FSEvents delays causing macOS flakiness, try/catch swallowing assertion errors, and fixed timing delays.

userStories.title: Add missing FSEvents readiness delays in hot-reload-dynamic.e2e.ts file watcher tests
userStories.description: As a CI maintainer, I want all file watcher tests to include the FSEvents readiness delay so that tests don't flake on macOS due to the fs.watch()/FSEvents race condition.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'file watcher still detects manifest changes after hot reload' test has a 500ms delay after waitForLog('File watcher: Watching') and before any file writes, in both the first phase (around line 1181) and the second phase (around line 1208-1223)
The 'rewriting tools.json preserves all tools' test has a 500ms delay after waitForLog('File watcher: Watching') at line 1271 and before the file write at line 1276
The delays include the same comment explaining the FSEvents race that all other file watcher tests in this file use

userStories.title: Fix try/catch swallowing assertion errors and replace fixed 500ms delay in in-flight dispatch test
userStories.description: As a test author, I want the in-flight tool dispatch test to fail properly when assertions fail and to reliably wait for the request to be in-flight before triggering hot reload.
acceptanceCriteria: The catch block at lines 813-822 re-throws AssertionError (or errors from expect()) instead of swallowing them, while still catching expected network errors (502 Bad Gateway, connection reset)
The fixed 500ms delay at line 805 is replaced with polling testServer.invocations() to confirm the in-flight request has reached the test server before triggering hot reload
